parameters.query: INSERT INTO conversations (customer_whatsapp_id, message_id, sender_type, message_type, content, original_media_url) VALUES ($1, $2, 'customer', $3, $4, $5) ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO NOTHING;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Normalizar mensagem').first().json.remoteJid, $('Normalizar mensagem').first().json.messageId, $('Normalizar mensagem').first().json.messageType, $('Normalizar mensagem').first().json.text, $('Normalizar mensagem').first().json.mediaUrl || null] }}

parameters.query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.image_url, p.tags, c.name AS category FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE LOWER(p.name) LIKE LOWER('%' || $1 || '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(p.tags, '')) LIKE LOWER('%' || $1 || '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(c.name, '')) LIKE LOWER('%' || $1 || '%') ORDER BY p.name LIMIT $2;
SELECT sender_type, message_type, content, timestamp FROM conversations WHERE customer_whatsapp_id = $1 ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10;

parameters.jsonBody: ={"model":"gpt-4o-mini","temperature":0.2,"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"Analise a imagem enviada por um cliente de uma loja de descartáveis. Extraia palavras-chave de produto, material, formato, tamanho aproximado e uso. Responda somente em JSON com os campos: descricao, palavras_chave."},{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Identifique o produto descartável ou embalagem na imagem."},{"type":"image_url","image_url":{"url":{{ JSON.stringify($json.imageDataUrl) }}}}]}]}

parameters.query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.image_url, p.tags, c.name AS category FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE LOWER(p.name || ' ' || COALESCE(p.tags, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(c.name, '')) LIKE LOWER('%' || $1 || '%') ORDER BY p.name LIMIT 5;
INSERT INTO conversations (customer_whatsapp_id, message_id, sender_type, message_type, content) VALUES ($1, $2, 'agent', 'text', $3) ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO NOTHING;
